title: Madhya Pradesh May 14, 2026, Weather Update: Bhopal Fumes Under Burning Sun, Orange Alert In Indore-Ujjain; Temperatures May Cross 44°C
description: Madhya Pradesh is facing intense heat, with half the state under heatwave conditions for four days, IMD said. Orange alert is issued for Indore, Ujjain, Dhar, and Ratlam, with hot winds and warm nights expected. Temperatures may cross 44°C in many districts. Peak heat is likely by May 16, affecting most regions, while some areas may see rain and strong winds.
content:
Bhopal (Madhya Pradesh): Madhya Pradesh has entered a phase of intense heat, with several regions witnessing extremely high temperatures.

title: Three held; security beefed up in Bhopal as Muslim community protests assault on man over ‘love jihad’
description: Security heightened in Bhopal after protests by the Muslim community against a man's assault linked to 'love jihad' allegations.
content: Three people were arrested on Wednesday (May 13, 2026) and security has been beefed up in various parts of Madhya Pradesh capital Bhopal a day after hundreds of members of the Muslim community staged demonstrations protesting the assault on a man by ... [2798 chars]
